Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Discover Canopy / Kovacs context in Slack
Tool: conversations_search_messages
Parameters that matter: search_query e.g. "Canopy", "Kovacs", "Toronto"; limit 20-40
Expected discovery: Threads on Dr. Renata Kovacs Nashville-Toronto / customs / TN visa; coordinator handoffs involving Chloe Vance and Fatimah; Canopy account-level context. Note: Dr. Anand Mehta CMO executive move details (Boston-Chicago, May 5 on-site, housing via UrbanNest, Eizo monitors, chain-of-custody filing cabinet) are primarily in email/CRM/Linear, not Slack.
OE 2: Discover GreenStack lab / hazmat and Mosaic stipend / DOT threads in Slack
Tool: conversations_search_messages
Parameters: search_query "GreenStack", "Mosaic", "stipend", "hazmat", "DOT", "Zhao", "Tanaka"; limit 20-40
Expected discovery: Mei-Lin Zhao Class 9 lithium Houston-Portland and interim storage; Joaquin Reyes rig move; Mosaic wave, stipend / ExpenseBot exposure, Keiko Tanaka laser / carrier documentation; ops updates from Chloe Vance referencing Swift / Greg Pallone where applicable.
OE 3: Discover email evidence for the three account buckets
Tool: search_emails
Parameters: query "Canopy", "Mehta", "GreenStack", "Mosaic", "Kovacs", "hazmat", "stipend" (multiple calls); folder_name INBOX and/or SENT as needed
Expected discovery: Patricia Langford - Catalina on Kovacs and Q2 batch; Mina/Fatimah - Patricia/Anand Mehta on executive relocation; UrbanNest Carmen Reyes on temporary housing options; GreenStack Derek Hollis on Zhao/Reyes; Hana Kim invoice INV-2026-0418 for GreenStack; stipend and lab-equipment threads tied to Fatimah's accounts.
OE 4: Confirm CRM companies and open deals for Canopy / GreenStack / Mosaic
Tool: crm_search_companies
Parameters: name "Canopy", "GreenStack", "Mosaic" (separate calls or filtered discovery)
Expected discovery: company records; account manager mappings (e.g. Catalina Dubois / Emeka Diallo on relevant accounts per CRM).
OE 5: Pull Canopy deals and engagement narrative for Q2 wave and surcharges
Tools: crm_search_deals, crm_list_engagements
Parameters: crm_search_deals with company_id from OE 4 (and/or dealname containing Mehta / Kovacs); crm_list_engagements with company_ids [Canopy company id]
Expected discovery: Deal for Dr. Anand Mehta executive relocation (~$12,170); deals for Kovacs / Webb / Okonkwo; engagement text on coordinator assignments, visa/customs, invoice INV-2026-0401 and pending surcharge approvals ($850 customs broker, etc.).
OE 6: Map Relocations and Client Accounts in Airtable to comms
Tools: airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, airtable_search_records (and/or airtable_list_records)
Parameters: base_id appMoveOpsOps001 (or equivalent from list_bases); table_name "Relocations"; field_name "Company" value "Canopy Health", "GreenStack Energy", "Mosaic Robotics"; table "Client Accounts" / stipend table as needed
Expected discovery: Rows for Canopy moves (including Kovacs window April 14-17 vs status); GreenStack in-progress Zhao/Reyes/Herrera (Herrera move window April 14-16 has passed but status is still "In Progress" -- stale, likely needs correction per OE 12) and completed Venkatesh/Fitzgerald; Mosaic lab moves and stipend-related rows; whether Mehta is missing from Relocations while deal exists in CRM.
OE 7: Cross-check stipend transactions vs chatter
Tool: airtable_search_records
Parameters: base_id appMoveOpsOps001; table_name "Stipend Transactions"; field_name "Account" value "GreenStack Energy" and "Mosaic Robotics" (separate calls)
Expected discovery: Pending/partial/rejected lines (e.g. Venkatesh headphones pending; Mosaic Washington/Nakamura auto-approval exposure documented in universe); mismatches vs email/Slack.
OE 8: Find Linear issues for Mehta workstreams and DOT / hazmat remediation
Tool: linear_list_issues
Parameters: query "Mehta", "DOT", "hazmat", "Tanaka", "Mosaic", "Canopy"; limit as needed
Expected discovery: Open or in-progress issues for housing/household move and DOT documentation subtasks tied to Tanaka/Swift; possible ops tickets to update after verifying PDF/cert status in email/Slack.
OE 9: Verify billing / invoice context for surcharge and fiscal deadlines
Tool: quickbooks_search_invoices
Parameters: criteria object filtering by customer / doc number as supported (e.g. discover INV-2026-0401, INV-2026-0418 from CRM/email first, then search QuickBooks)
Expected discovery: Amounts and line items aligning with engagements (Canopy batch $9,210; GreenStack $9,440 invoice referenced in email) for leadership briefing.
OE 10: Resolve recipient and channel identifiers before writes
Tools: contacts_search_contacts, channels_list
Parameters: contacts query "Catalina Dubois", "Chloe Vance", "Carmen Reyes", "Anand Mehta" as needed; channels_list channel_types public_channel,private_channel, limit 50
Expected discovery: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, chloe.vance@moveops.com, carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com, anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io; valid channel_id strings for ops/coordination (not raw "#channel" names) for conversations_add_message.
OE 11: Create or enrich Mehta relocation row if tracker is missing CRM-backed move
Tool: airtable_create_record
Parameters: base_id appMoveOpsOps001; table_name "Relocations"; fields including Name "Dr. Anand Mehta", Company "Canopy Health", Status "In Progress", Origin/Destination, dates aligned to email (late April pack, early May delivery), Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi", Special Requirements summarizing three workstreams from discovered threads
OE 12: Correct stale Relocations statuses when move windows have passed and comms confirm execution
Tool: airtable_update_records
Parameters: base_id appMoveOpsOps001; table_id tblRelocations01; records array with id from OE 6/8 discovery and fields e.g. Status "Completed" for Kovacs when verified
OE 13: Reconcile Client Accounts notes or counts when Airtable contradicts CRM/email totals
Tool: airtable_update_records
Parameters: base_id, table_id for Client Accounts; records with ids from OE 6; fields Notes / Total Relocations only where justified by tallies from OE 4-7
OE 14: Update or close Linear issues when DOT/placarding status is verified from Swift/Chloe sources
Tools: linear_get_issue (resolve internal issue id from linear_list_issues), linear_update_issue
Parameters: id = internal Linear issue id; state/description updated to match whether PDF cert is received and filed
OE 15: Create tracking for Fatimah DOT hazmat training documentation gap
Tool: linear_create_issue
Parameters: team Operations (or Relocations -- match linear_list_teams); title/description referencing need to file coordinator hazmat training under 49 CFR Subpart H context discovered in Slack/email; assignee Chloe Vance or Fatimah per policy; dueDate before DOT response deadline found in data
OE 16: Optional hard deadline on calendar for cert / DOT package assembly
Tool: calendar_add_calendar_event
Parameters: title/description for hazmat training documentation; start_datetime/end_datetime; tag compliance if used in universe
OE 17: Account-manager air cover for Canopy (Catalina) with full context
Tool: send_email
Parameters: sender fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com; recipients [catalina.dubois@moveops.com]; subject/content summarizing Mehta three workstreams, Kovacs/Webb/Okonkwo loose ends, Patricia as HR contact, surcharges -- content grounded in OE 3-6
OE 18: Escalate blockers to Chloe (DOT package, invoicing, capacity, training records)
Tool: send_email and/or conversations_add_message
Parameters: sender fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com; recipients [chloe.vance@moveops.com] with open questions from OE 2-9; OR conversations_add_message with channel_id from OE 10, user_id Fatimah's Slack user id, payload summarizing same blockers
OE 19: Re-engage vendor on Mehta temporary housing holds
Tool: send_email
Parameters: sender fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com; recipients [carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com]; subject/content asking to confirm or re-lock recommended unit (Streeterville / Pinnacle per email thread)
OE 20: Nudge relocatee on housing selection if still pending
Tool: send_email
Parameters: sender fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com; recipients [anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io]; cc Mina/Patricia per existing thread; content references three UrbanNest options from discovered email

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must call airtable_create_record or airtable_update_records on the Relocations table such that the record fields reference Dr. Anand Mehta (or Mehta) and Canopy Health.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✗✓✓ 83%
✓Run #1The trajectory shows airtable_create_record called on table_name 'Relocations' with fields Name='Dr. Anand Mehta' and Company='Canopy Health'. This directly satisfies the criterion.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_create_record with table_name 'Relocations', and the fields payload explicitly includes 'Name': 'Dr. Anand Mehta' and 'Company': 'Canopy Health'.
✓Run #3The agent called airtable_create_record with table_name 'Relocations', fields 'Name': 'Dr. Anand Mehta' and 'Company': 'Canopy Health'. This clearly passes the criterion.
✗Run #4The trajectory shows an airtable_update_records call, but it only updates the Kovacs record (recKovacsNashvilleToronto). There is no airtable_create_record or airtable_update_records call that references Dr. Anand Mehta or Canopy Health in a Relocations record. The agent messaged Catalina via Slack about Mehta but did not create or update a Mehta Airtable relocation record.
✓Run #5The agent called airtable_create_record on the Relocations table with fields including 'Name': 'Dr. Anand Mehta' and 'Company': 'Canopy Health'.
✓Run #6The agent called airtable_create_record with table_name 'Relocations', fields including 'Name': 'Dr. Anand Mehta' and 'Company': 'Canopy Health'.
2 The model must call airtable_update_records to set Status to Completed (or equivalent completion) on a Relocations record that references Dr. Renata Kovacs or Kovacs with Nashville and Toronto in the same update payload.
outcome
 ✗✓✗✓✓✓ 67%
✗Run #1No airtable_update_records call appears anywhere in the trajectory. The agent only flagged the Kovacs/Nashville→Toronto issue in emails and Slack but never updated the Airtable record to Completed or any completion status.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_update_records with record id 'recKovacsNashvilleToronto' and fields {'Status': 'Completed'} — the record id itself references Kovacs, Nashville, and Toronto, satisfying the requirement.
✗Run #3The agent never called airtable_update_records to set Status to 'Completed' on a Kovacs record. It identified the move window had passed (April 14–17) but left updating Airtable as an action item for Fatimah rather than executing the update itself.
✓Run #4The trajectory includes an airtable_update_records call with table_id 'tblRelocations01', record id 'recKovacsNashvilleToronto', and field Status set to 'Completed'. This satisfies the criterion for updating Kovacs's Nashville-to-Toronto relocation status to Completed.
✓Run #5The agent called airtable_update_records with records id 'recKovacsNashvilleToronto' and fields Status: 'Completed'. The record ID references Kovacs and the trajectory confirms Nashville→Toronto context from prior searches.
✓Run #6The agent called airtable_update_records with records array including id 'recKovacsNashvilleToronto' and fields {'Status': 'Completed'}. The record ID itself references Kovacs/Nashville/Toronto, satisfying this criterion.
3 The model must call send_email with sender [fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com](mailto:fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com) and [catalina.dubois@moveops.com](mailto:catalina.dubois@moveops.com) included in the recipients array.
outcome
 ✓✗✗✗✓✓ 50%
✓Run #1A send_email call is present with sender='fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com' and recipients=['catalina.dubois@moveops.com'], satisfying this criterion.
✗Run #2The agent never called send_email with catalina.dubois@moveops.com in the recipients array. Catalina was briefed via conversations_add_message (Slack), not email. The only send_email call was to carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com.
✗Run #3The agent used conversations_add_message (Slack) to loop in Catalina, not send_email. No send_email call with catalina.dubois@moveops.com appears anywhere in the trajectory.
